# Omuz Serisi — Derleme (2026-06-07)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Rehabilitation of Arthrogenic Muscle Inhibition in Patients with Knee Osteoarthritis and after Knee Arthroplasty.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik rehabilitasyon of arthrogenic muscle inhibition in patients with knee osteoarthritis and after knee arthroplasty. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: current reviews in musculoskeletal medicine. 2026 jun 6. Anahtar kavramlar: knee, rehabilitasyon, arthrogenic, muscle, inhibition, patients.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42249256/

### Ultrasound-Guided Intervention in Adhesive Capsulitis: A Comprehensive Review of Therapeutic Strategies.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik ultrasound-guided intervention in adeziv kapsülit (donuk omuz): a comprehensive review of therapeutic strategies. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: biomedical journal. 2026 jun 4. Anahtar kavramlar: ultrasound, guided, intervention, adhesive, capsulitis, comprehensive.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42248412/

### Side-locked Headache Associated with Habitual Neck-Shoulder Mobile Phone Clamping: A Case Series.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik side-locked headache associated with habitual neck-omuz mobile phone clamping: a case series. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: annals of indian academy of neurology. 2026 may 29. Anahtar kavramlar: side, locked, headache, associated, habitual, neck.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42241210/

### Free Fibula Flap Arthrodesis After En Bloc Resection of Distal Radius Giant Cell Tumors: Functional and Oncologic Outcomes From a Single-institution Experience.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik free fibula flap arthrodesis after en bloc resection of distal radius giant cell tumors: fonksiyonal and oncologic sonuçs from a single-institution experience. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: plastic and reconstructive surgery. global open. 2026 jun. Anahtar kavramlar: free, fibula, flap, arthrodesis, after, bloc.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42238382/

### Effectiveness of a home-based exercise program for improving upper limb function in community-dwelling older people: A pragmatic randomized controlled trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik effectiveness of a home-based egzersiz program for improving upper limb fonksiyon in community-dwelling older people: a pragmatic randomize controlled klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: plos one. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: effectiveness, home, based, egzersiz, program, improving.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42234658/

### Injury and Illness Prevalence and Incidence in Swedish Olympic Athletes: A 3-year Prospective Cohort Study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik injury and illness prevalence and incidence in swedish olympic athletes: a 3-year prospective cohort study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: sports medicine - open. 2026 jun 3. Anahtar kavramlar: injury, illness, prevalence, incidence, swedish, olympic.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42234311/
